creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
The config.log file was provided contains next line:

configure:10153: error: 5.1.0-0-g0 does not match <major>.<minor>.
<bugfix>-<nrev>-g<gid> or VERSION

I haven't that one in my config.log file.

The related code in jemalloc/configure script, from 10151 line, where with_version is set to "5.1.0-0-g0":

      echo "${with_version}" | grep '^VERSION$' 2>&1 1>/dev/null
      if test $? -ne 0 ; then
        as_fn_error $? "${with_version} does not match <major>.<mi
nor>.<bugfix>-<nrev>-g<gid> or VERSION" "$LINENO" 5
      fi

Could you take a look on this on your machine.  Probably the environment has been polluted somehow, but I'm not sure at the moment.
